title: leucophyllum frutescens
intro: Leucophyllum frutescens, also known as Texas Sage or Purple Sage, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the Southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and essential oils. The health benefits of Leucophyllum frutescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Leucophyllum frutescens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used topically in creams and salves to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
